title: Overflow
overview: When 15-year-old Asa loses her parents to an accident, she's taken in by her strange aunt, Makio.

title: Wrap
overview: Makio's friend visits to meet Asa. Later, Makio meets with an old acquaintance for some advice.

title: Discard
overview: Makio and Asa return home to sort through her family's belongings, and Asa attends middle school graduation.

title: Cower
overview: Asa begins high school as Makio grapples with the new responsibilities of being her guardian.

title: Decide
overview: Asa struggles to choose an extracurricular activity as she recalls old memories of Minori.

title: Overlap
overview: As Asa enters summer break, Makio finds herself growing closer with Kasamachi-kun.

title: Leave in Writing
overview: As Makio weighs what to do with Minori's journal, she meets Emiri's mother and learns of Minori's past.

title: Wander
overview: After discovering Minori's journal, Asa begins skipping school, prompting Makio to search for her.

title: Intersect
overview: Asa returns to school and tries her hand at writing lyrics, while Makio battles writer’s block.

title: Bind
overview: Asa continues working on original lyrics while her classmates face struggles of their own at school.

title: Set Free
overview: With Valentine's Day approaching and no Valentine, Asa asks others about their plans in hopes of chocolate.

title: Find
overview: Asa auditions as her band's vocalist. Meanwhile, Makio and Michiko meet up while Kasamachi runs into Tono.

title: Morning Is Here
overview: A chance meeting at the station leads Asa to invite Chiyo to her band club’s upcoming performance.
